summary_one_line: A 4-byte script tag matching HB_SCRIPT_OLD_UYGHUR ('Ougr') must reach the switch so the OLD_UYGHUR case arm fires.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: An input whose script-tag field is driven to the exact 4-byte FOURCC for HB_SCRIPT_OLD_UYGHUR so the switch ((hb_tag_t) script) at hb-common.cc:586 dispatches to the case HB_SCRIPT_OLD_UYGHUR arm at line 652 (true side), returning HB_DIRECTION_RTL.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile resolves the branch in all 10 trials (avg 52 hits) within 0.70h; its CMP_MAP distance-bucket feedback rewards inputs whose script-tag operand grows closer (matching-prefix length) to the OLD_UYGHUR constant, so havoc bytes that incrementally approach the FOURCC are retained as corpus and the tag is solved without the per-execution cost of the I2S/CmpLog stage.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile_cmplog blocks the branch in 9/10 trials (avg 0 hits, 22.10h blocked); it adds the per-execution CmpLog buffer + I2SRandReplace stage on top of value_profile, but that extra per-execution cost slows throughput on this deep call chain without delivering the tag, so it never drives the script field to the OLD_UYGHUR constant within budget.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: The winner is value_profile, which has no input-to-state substitution mutator; its enabling technique is the CMP_MAP gradient (matching-prefix / Hamming-distance bucket feedback) that incrementally rewards script-tag bytes approaching the OLD_UYGHUR constant. Adding the I2S+CmpLog stage (the value_profile_cmplog loser) only adds per-execution overhead here, so the divergence is attributable to value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient working unencumbered, not to comparison substitution.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the case HB_SCRIPT_OLD_UYGHUR arm of a switch on the script tag, whose true side returns HB_DIRECTION_RTL.
Dispatch is a switch over the script tag cast to hb_tag_t (a 4-byte FOURCC compare).
value_profile resolves the branch in all 10 trials while value_profile_cmplog blocks it in 9/10, with the winner hitting the branch and the loser never reaching it.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: avg hitcount on branch: winner=52  loser=0

evidence_trail.claim: The winner resolves quickly while the loser stays blocked for the full budget.
value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient rewards inputs whose CMP operands grow closer to matching, preserving them as corpus.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: The CMP_MAP distance bucket encodes matching-prefix length for string/memory CMPs, which is the relevant signal for a multi-byte tag compare.
value_profile has no I2SRandReplace mutator, so the winner does not rely on I2S substitution.
value_profile_cmplog (the loser) adds the I2SRandReplace mutator and a per-execution CMP buffer on top of value_profile.
The loser pays extra per-execution cost from the CMP buffer record on top of value_profile's CMP_MAP update.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
edge increment + CMP-buffer record + CMP_MAP
update per intercepted CMP per execution

evidence_trail.claim: The winning seeds carry only havoc/value_profile mutation_ops, consistent with value_profile (no I2S) finding them.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Not applicable: the winner is value_profile (no I2SRandReplace), so the enabling technique is the CMP_MAP gradient, not I2S. Lineage dash-row verification is only mandatory when claimed_mechanism=I2SRandReplace. The winner seeds explicitly carry value_profile provenance with havoc-only mutation_ops (e.g. ByteAddMutator/BytesDeleteMutator), and the prompt states value_profile has no I2SRandReplace, so no I2S floor signal is expected or required here.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness with a single 4-byte switch/compare against a fixed FOURCC where value_profile_cmplog resolves it as fast as or faster than value_profile (no I2S-overhead penalty), showing the CMP_MAP gradient is not the decisive winner mechanism.

weakest_evidence_point: The attribution that I2S+CmpLog per-execution overhead (rather than some other value_profile_cmplog-specific exploration difference) is what blocks the loser is inferred from the cost paragraphs, not directly measured at this branch.
